posts.author: Divy1
posts.text: Havells Q1FY27 highlight Financial & Business Overview Strong Revenue Growth: The company delivered strong revenue growth, as demand remained resilient despite inflationary pressures. Inflation Impact: Significant raw material inflation prompted calibrated and staggered price hikes across categories. Price Hikes: Consumer categories successfully absorbed price hikes, which averaged 7-8% across the board. Profitability Pressure: Quarterly profitability was impacted by front-loaded, aggressive advertising spends, which are expected to normalize through the year. Resilient Demand: The summer seas…
